bird.name: Noronha vireo
bird.summary: The Noronha vireo (Vireo gracilirostris) is a Vulnerable species of bird in the family Vireonidae, the vireos, greenlets, and shrike-babble…

relations.subject: Noronha vireo
relations.evidence: The Noronha vireo is found only on Fernando de Noronha island, which is about off the coast of northeastern Brazil. It is the only vireo on the island and is found "[in] any habitat". These include forest, shrublands, and gardens. Primary forest has been almost entirely eliminated on the island so secondary forest remains
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
